english_news.title: Trump cancels signing of bipartisan housing bill, demanding voter-ID provision
english_news.summary: President Donald Trump abruptly canceled the signing of a bill aimed at increasing housing affordability an hour before he was due at the Capitol for the ceremony.

english_news.title: U.S. crude oil dips below $70 as tankers transit Strait of Hormuz
english_news.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump intensified pressure on oil companies to lower gasoline prices following the recent decline in crude.

english_news.title: Amazon's Zoox unveils redesigned robotaxi ahead of upcoming expansion
english_news.summary: Zoox is updating its robotaxis as the Amazon division plots expansion in additional markets and prepares to charge for rides.

english_news.title: Slate Auto says each $24,950 electric pickup truck will be profitable as it aims to be cash-flow positive next year
english_news.summary: EV startup Slate Auto CEO Peter Faricy told CNBC that every vehicle the company produces will be gross margin positive.

english_news.title: New meme stock Wendy's soars 30% with trading halted at one point
english_news.summary: While management changes can influence investor sentiment, the magnitude of the move suggests other forces may be at play.

english_news.title: Treasury Secretary Bessent says U.S. GDP growth can return to 3% before end of the year
english_news.summary: Bessent sees his "3-3-3" plan as still in reach — 3% growth, a 3% deficit-to-GDP rate and a 3 million barrels per day increase in oil production.

english_news.title: Trump claims Iran has assured U.S. there won't be tolls on the Strait of Hormuz
english_news.summary: There will be no tolls, insurance costs, or charges of any kind for ships looking to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, Trump said.

english_news.title: Kalshi CEO says prediction market thinking about IPO, but not for this year
english_news.summary: Tarek Mansour said to CNBC's "Squawk Box" it made sense for the company at the stage to think about a debut on public markets.

english_news.title: Power outages hit France as record heatwave set to peak
english_news.summary: About 68,000 homes in Brittany have been affected, with electricity unlikely to be fully restored until Wednesday night.

english_news.title: Air conditioning creates political divide after France records hottest day
english_news.summary: France is being forced to re-think its longstanding reservations about air-conditioning as temperatures soar.

english_news.title: UN nuclear chief says inspectors will visit Iran sites as part of war deal
english_news.summary: Rafael Grossi says the IAEA is "working on modalities" but an Iranian  minister says such access would only be part of a final deal with the US.

english_news.title: Clean sweep for Mamdani-backed candidates in New York's Democratic primary
english_news.summary: Brad Lander unseats Dan Goldman in a race that laid bare the city's divisions over the Israel-Gaza war.

english_news.title: Biggest city in Crimea without power after Ukraine strikes
english_news.summary: Sevastopol's Moscow-installed governor warns there will be no electricity in some areas until the evening.

english_news.title: France confirms first Ebola case
english_news.summary: The French doctor had been working in DR Congo, where more than 260 people are known to have died.

english_news.title: French woman allegedly held captive by husband for 12 years rescued in Pakistan
english_news.summary: Yasmina alleges she was held along with her five children, and they were all cut off from the outside world.

english_news.title: Sydney woman wakes from induced coma more than a week after shark attack
english_news.summary: Leah Stewart, 34, had one of her arms amputated after she was bitten while swimming at Coogee Beach.

华东医药：全资子公司获得注射用HDM2005药物临床试验批准通知书
36氪获悉，华东医药公告，全资子公司杭州中美华东制药有限公司收到国家药监局核准签发的《药物临床试验批准通知书》，注射用HDM2005联合PD-1单抗和AD用于治疗经典型霍奇金淋巴瘤的临床试验申请获批。该药物为靶向ROR1的ADC药物，目前正围绕恶性肿瘤开展多适应症临床开发。本次获批将提升公司在肿瘤治疗领域的核心竞争力，但药物从临床试验到上市存在不确定性，对近期业绩无重大影响。

chinese_news.title: 完成数亿元新融资，影眸科技 Hyper3D 让 3D 生成进入“思考时代”丨36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文｜王欣逸

编辑｜张雨忻

2026 年开年来，3D 生成模型赛道相当热闹。

今年第一季度，影眸科技发布首个 3D 编辑模型 Rodin Gen-2 Edit，让 AI 3D 模型第一次可编辑；今年 6 月，VAST 官宣了新一轮融资，Meshy 也紧随其后，宣称自己发布了全球首款 3D AI Agent。

近日，影眸科技——这支扎根学术圈、创业早、年轻的 3D 模型团队，带着最新的技术研究成果，以及新一轮融资，再添了一把火。

这支团队创立于 2020 年，创始人兼 CEO 吴迪、和联合创始人兼 CTO 张启煊以及另外两位联合创始人张龙文、曾初啸均来自上海科技大学。团队约 60 人，平均年龄不到 25 岁。

尽管看起来年轻，但在 B 端市场，影眸几乎站稳了头部地

chinese_news.title: 圆桌对话：诶? AI! AI这个月、AI这一年、AI这五年｜36氪WAVES2026新浪潮
chinese_news.summary:
“2026年，创投圈的浪潮再次翻涌：AI从技术概念走进产业深水区，硬科技创业从“小众赛道” 变成“主流共识”，年轻的创业者们正在用代码和双手，重新定义中国创新的未来坐标。

每一年，由36氪 · 暗涌主办的WAVES大会，都是中国创投圈的年度风向标。今年的 WAVES 2026以“今年盛夏”为主题，落地广州番禺良仓新造创意园，在两天的时间里，我们汇聚了顶级投资人、产业领袖、新锐创业者，用14场深度圆桌、数十场独立演讲，拆解 AI、硬科技、出海、医疗等核心赛道的底层逻辑，见证那些“少数人” 的坚持，如何汇聚成改变行业的浪潮。”

chinese_news.title: 仙工智能的过山车：暗盘破发7%、首日冲高38%
chinese_news.summary:
本文约1100字，建议阅读3分钟

作者 | 彭孝秋

6月24日，仙工智能（06106.HK）正式在港交所敲钟上市，开盘平开，报101.6港元，随后一路拉升，最高冲到140.50（+38.3%）。之后回落，截至发稿报115.70港元，仍涨13.88%。振幅38.29%，成交5.33亿，市值127.8亿港元。

按这个市值算，其去年4.42亿元收入，静态市销率已升到约25倍，成为港股估值最贵的机器人新股。全球AMR第一的极智嘉约9倍，

chinese_news.title: AI × OPC的新可能：一个人，就是一支队伍｜2026WAVES
chinese_news.summary:
2026年6月16日，36氪2026 WAVES 新浪潮大会在广州番禺良仓新造创意园开幕。以下这场圆桌论坛是大会首日下午的收官议题，探讨 AI 时代 OPC（One Person Company）的真实生态。

八九十年代，一辆三轮车、一个摊位，就能撑起一门生意。今天的 OPC 看起来形似，但底层逻辑已经彻底不同。

过去个体户的杠杆是体力、经验和地理位置，本质上是基于本地的 LBS 服务，脱不开那个具体的摊位。今天 OPC 的杠杆是代码和媒体——边际成本几乎为零的杠杆，加上 AI 带来的生产力平权，让一个人第一次拥有了接近公司的交付能力。

这场圆桌汇集了 OPC 生态的上中下游：已经跑出商业闭环的 OPC 创业者、每天和年轻创业者打交道的高校创新创业负责人、云计算和底层算力平台的专家。几个值得关注的行业趋势在讨论中浮出水面：

第一，云的用户画像正在发生迁移，云平台的产品逻辑也在随之重构。阿里云今年2月的用户调研发现，传统“写代码的开发者”仅占现场用户的20%，产品与运营背景的人已占35%，企业主占21%。基础设

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Bitcoin close above $70,000 on December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: BTC broke below Rainbow Chart 'dead zone' and CoinDesk reports $55k floor risk; macro narrative shifting on Bessent's 3% growth target and oil/inflation dynamics.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (Bitcoin Rainbow Chart breach, $55k floor analysis); CNBC (crude <$70, Bessent 3-3-3 plan)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Federal Reserve issue or authorize a CBDC before January 1, 2027?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump cancelled housing bill containing CBDC ban until 2030; political risk around Bessent's growth/deficit plans may force Fed action sooner than expected.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: Cointelegraph (CBDC ban in cancelled 21st Century ROAD Act); CNBC (Treasury policy signals)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Amazon's Zoox complete a commercial robotaxi ride-for-pay launch in at least 2 U.S. cities by June 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Zoox unveiled redesigned robotaxis and announced multi-market expansion with imminent paid-ride rollout; Amazon capital available.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Zoox redesign, expansion prep, paid-ride timeline)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum close above $3,500 on December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: StanChart projects $3,500 by 2030 on DeFi revival; current DeFi TVL down 39% YTD and major hacks (Kelp DAO) present capitulation opportunity.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CoinDesk (StanChart $3,500 thesis); Cointelegraph (DeFi TVL -39%, exploit cycle)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Strait of Hormuz experience a major shipping disruption (>48 hrs closure or >20% traffic reduction) before December 31, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Trump claims Iran assured no tolls, but geopolitical volatility remains; UN nuclear chief discussing inspections signals fragile Iran deal; oil market pricing this risk low.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Trump Iran toll claim); BBC (IAEA inspections under negotiation)

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Binance secure a MiCA-compliant crypto exchange license in an EU jurisdiction before July 1, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Official EU regulatory databases (ESMA registry) or Binance press release
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Binance withdrew Greece application days before deadline but hasn't announced alternative jurisdiction; market underprices regulatory execution risk and likelihood of 'wind-down lite' vs full compliance.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph (Binance Greece withdrawal, MiCA July 1 hard deadline); crypto policy Twitter tracking EU filings

market_questions_to_create.question: Will U.S. crude oil average below $65/barrel for the month of September 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: EIA Weekly Petroleum Status Report (average Sep 2026 WTI); NYMEX front-month settlement
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Trump pushing oil companies to lower prices; Bessent's 3M bbl/day increase target creates supply-side pressure; geopolitical risk (Iran) is hedged but market hasn't fully priced demand destruction.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (Trump pressure, crude <$70 current, Bessent 3-3-3 plan); EIA supply/demand forecasts

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Slate Auto achieve cash-flow positive status in the calendar year 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Slate Auto quarterly 10-Q filing, press release, or verified industry analyst report (e.g., Cox Automotive)
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: CEO claims every vehicle produced is gross-margin positive; but path to operating CFP in 12 months is aggressive for EV startup; execution and production ramp risk ignored by meme-stock momentum.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC (Slate Auto CFP target, $24,950 truck, gross margin claims); production delivery data

market_questions_to_create.question: Will stablecoin notional value (all major stablecoins: USDC, USDT, USDP, DAI combined) exceed $150 billion by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: DefiLlama (stablecoin aggregate TVL/supply), Messari Crypto Data Pro, or official issuer reports
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Cointelegraph reports banking lobby opposition to stablecoins, but CBDC delays (Trump housing bill ban) may accelerate stablecoin adoption as Fed alternative; DeFi TVL down 39% but stablecoins more resilient.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Cointelegraph (banking lobby stance, CBDC ban); DeFi TVL -39% YTD; regulatory clarity improving

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the AAVE token close above $2,000 on June 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko, Messari, or major exchange (Kraken, Coinbase) spot price at 2026-06-30 23:59 UTC
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: AAVE up 5.9% on recent index performance; StanChart thesis for $3,500 by 2030 implies ~40% CAGR; DeFi TVL crash creates capitulation entry, but recovery thesis hinges on regulatory clarity (Bessent pro-growth, CBDC delays).
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CoinDesk (AAVE +5.9%, StanChart $3,500 thesis); Cointelegraph (DeFi TVL crash, exploit cleanup); macro liquidity thaw

investment_theses.thesis: Crude oil faces downside to $60–65/bbl by Q3 2026 as Trump's price-cutting pressure on producers combines with demand destruction from Bessent's growth stall and Iranian supply overhang.
supporting_signals: CNBC: crude already <$70, Trump intensifying price pressure
CNBC: Bessent's 3-3-3 plan credibility questioned (3% growth hard to achieve)
BBC/CNBC: Iran nuclear deal fragility (IAEA inspections under negotiation, no tolls pledge likely theater)
investment_theses.counter_view: Geopolitical black swan (Hormuz closure, Iran escalation) could spike oil to $85+ within weeks; Trump's public pressure may be negotiation theater, not binding policy.
investment_theses.expression: Short WTI crude futures (CL) or long inverse energy ETF (DXD); duration 60-90 days, scale into weakness

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin consolidates $65–75k range through 2026 as macro liquidity remains tight (Bessent deficit/growth tension), but CBDC delay (post-cancelled housing bill) and stablecoin momentum offset bear case.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: BTC broke Rainbow Chart floor, $55k downside cited but not imminent
Cointelegraph: CBDC ban until 2030 removes Fed issuance tail risk, supports stablecoin thesis
CNBC: Bessent growth plan credibility low; fiscal drag likely
investment_theses.counter_view: Sustained rate hold + recession triggers portfolio de-risking; crypto forced liquidations on margin; BTC breaks $55k in 6 months.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot (allocation: 2–5% portfolio) or ETF (IBIT, FBTC) with tight 30% stop-loss; hedge with short BTC 1y perp if macro deteriorates

investment_theses.thesis: DeFi sector (as proxy: AAVE, governance tokens) bottoming now (39% TVL crash YTD, major exploits cleared) with 2–3x upside to end-2026 if regulatory clarity (CBDC delay, stablecoin exemptions in failed housing bill) permits recovery.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: DeFi TVL -39% YTD (capitulation zone); major hacks (Kelp DAO) now reflected
Cointelegraph: Stablecoin exemptions negotiated in CBDC ban (positive for lending protocol collateral)
CoinDesk: AAVE +5.9% on sentiment recovery; StanChart $3,500 2030 thesis implies conviction
investment_theses.counter_view: More exploits surface; regulatory crackdown on yield products; Fed stays tight, collateral values spiral.
investment_theses.expression: Long AAVE (spot or Kraken, Coinbase) with target $1,500–2,000 by EOY; hedge with stablecoin USDC allocation; 40% position, scale 25% into +50% gains

investment_theses.thesis: U.S. equity indices (SPY/QQQ) underperform due to stagflation re-pricing as Bessent's 3% growth target proves unachievable and deficit ceiling becomes political theatre by Q3 2026.
supporting_signals: CNBC: Bessent 3% growth + 3% deficit-to-GDP target credibility low (already miss Fed dot plots)
CNBC: Trump cancelling bipartisan housing bill signals political instability, not policy clarity
BBC: France heatwave + power outages foreshadow Euro recession; U.S. forward-looking correlation high
investment_theses.counter_view: Corporate earnings beat on productivity (AI, efficiency gains); Fed cuts rates sooner if growth falters; equity volatility compresses.
investment_theses.expression: Short QQQ (tech-heavy, rate-sensitive) or long VIX calls (3–6 month duration); or overweight SPY defensive sector rotation (XLP, XLU, XLV); cash drag acceptable

investment_theses.thesis: Stablecoin supply and yield (USDC, yield-bearing USDT products) attract capital as CBDC delay until 2030 confirmed and DeFi recovery begins; USDC on-chain yield (Aave, Compound) reaches 5–7% by EOY 2026.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: CBDC ban until 2030 removes regulatory uncertainty
Cointelegraph: Stablecoins explicitly exempted from CBDC ban (housing bill language)
CoinDesk: DeFi TVL crashed but base rates stabilizing; capital returning to stablecoin pools
investment_theses.counter_view: Banking lobby pressure (CoinDesk: 'banking lobby wrong on stablecoins') may flip; regulatory scrutiny increases; yield compresses back to 1–2%.
investment_theses.expression: Long USDC spot allocation + Aave aUSDC (Lido or direct deposit); target 6% all-in yield; hedge tail risk with DXY long (inflation hedge)
